client_context: Client is a mid-size company procuring a hosted LLM API and fine-tuning services from Vendor for a customer-facing claims intake assistant. Review the agreement from the Customer side. Customer will integrate the API into a child-directed education product and needs age-gating obligations reviewed.
instruction: Review the AI model services agreement against the playbook. Flag deviations with exact quotes, propose fallback text where required, and escalate missing information.
